---
title: "Course Analytics Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  course_id: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "fetch_data.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "fetch_class_snapshots.R"))

course_id <- params$course_id

course <- with_connection(function(con) {
  dbGetQuery(con, sqlInterpolate(con,
    "SELECT id, code, title FROM courses WHERE id = ?cid",
    cid = course_id))
})
sessions <- fetch_sessions_for_course(course_id)
```

---

**Course:** `r course$code` – `r course$title`  
**Total Sessions:** `r nrow(sessions)`

---

## 1. Engagement Trend Across Sessions

```{r eng-trend}
if (nrow(sessions) > 0) {
  eng_per_session <- lapply(sessions$id, function(sid) {
    snaps <- fetch_class_snapshots(sid)
    if (nrow(snaps) == 0) return(NULL)
    data.frame(
      session_id   = sid,
      actual_start = sessions$actual_start[sessions$id == sid][1],
      avg_eng      = mean(as.numeric(snaps$engagement_score), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  })
  eng_df <- do.call(rbind, Filter(Negate(is.null), eng_per_session))
  if (!is.null(eng_df) && nrow(eng_df) > 0) {
    eng_df$actual_start <- as.POSIXct(eng_df$actual_start)
    ggplot(eng_df, aes(x = actual_start, y = avg_eng)) +
      geom_line(colour = "#42A5F5", linewidth = 1) +
      geom_point(colour = "#1565C0", size = 2) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, colour = "#FF7043",
                  linetype = "dashed") +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
      labs(x = "Session Date", y = "Avg Engagement",
           title = "Engagement Trend Across Sessions") +
      theme_minimal()
  } else {
    cat("No engagement data.")
  }
} else {
  cat("No sessions found for this course.")
}
```

## 2. Session-by-Session Statistics

```{r session-stats}
if (nrow(sessions) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(sessions[, c("title","actual_start","students_present")],
               col.names = c("Session","Date","Students"),
               digits = 0)
} else {
  cat("No session data.")
}
```

## 3. Student Participation Over Time

```{r participation}
if (nrow(sessions) > 0) {
  attend_data <- with_connection(function(con) {
    placeholders <- paste(sprintf("'%s'", sessions$id), collapse=",")
    dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
      "SELECT sa.session_id,
              COUNT(CASE WHEN sa.status IN ('present','late') THEN 1 END) AS attended,
              ls.actual_start
         FROM session_attendance sa
         JOIN lecture_sessions ls ON ls.id = sa.session_id
        WHERE sa.session_id IN (%s)
        GROUP BY sa.session_id, ls.actual_start
        ORDER BY ls.actual_start", placeholders))
  })
  if (nrow(attend_data) > 0) {
    attend_data$actual_start <- as.POSIXct(attend_data$actual_start)
    ggplot(attend_data, aes(x = actual_start, y = attended)) +
      geom_col(fill = "#66BB6A") +
      labs(x = "Session Date", y = "Students Present",
           title = "Attendance per Session") +
      theme_minimal()
  }
}
```
